payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: White painted wooden mantel with rectangular recessed panels and molded trim framing a black metal firebox insert with a stepped inner surround; hearth interior appears dark/empty, the crop is partially edge‑cropped and includes foreground decorative objects — estimated distance to camera ~1.5 meters.
